afd.snippet: 000 FXUS65 KBOU 211913 AFDBOU Area Forecast Discussion National Weather Service Denver/Boulder CO 113 PM MDT Tue Jul 21 2026 .KEY MESSAGES... - Storm coverage and intensity increases on Wednesday and Thursday as monsoonal moisture moves into the region. alerts.title: US 287 Intersection Improvements-139889
alerts.description:
Between County Road 72 and CO 14 (7 to 8 miles north of the Laporte area) from Mile Point 363 to Mile Point 362. Road construction. Alternating traffic. Starting July 22, 2026 at 6:30AM MDT until July 22, 2026 at about 7:00PM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 22, 6:30AM - July 22, 7:00PM Comment: MP 362-363 SB lane closure M-F 7/20-7/24 6:30am-7pm with flagging and alternating traffic queues. Expect Delays.
